chunks.topic: How to Preview Your Website on Mobile
chunks.text: Now I will tell you about a technique by which you will be able to see whatever we develop on this website, on this mobile. Now listen carefully to the steps. Right-click, open terminal, and type IP config. If you are on an older version, you can also open command prompt or PowerShell. As soon as you type IP config and press enter, you will see the IPV4 address here: 192.168.1.199. Now, this IP address that we got here, I will copy it. So this is the IPV4 address, I will copy it. And in my settings, I will write live preview. This 'local IP host address to host your files on' that is written, in its place I will write my IP address. And after doing this, I will restart my VS Code. You will also need to ensure one more thing: that you go into your Wi-Fi settings and make your network a private network. It shouldn't be a public network, it should be a private network. Network and internet, Wi-Fi, whichever Wi-Fi you are connected to, make it a private network. And now if you right-click and show preview, you will see your IP address here: /index.html. I can now also use this on my phone. So I will quickly enter this IP address here. So I entered 192.168.1.199:5000. Yours could be 3000, whatever your port is, enter that. And here you can see, my website has been previewed on mobile. This trick comes in very handy when we want to preview on our mobile. Because nowadays most websites are viewed on phones. So we would want our phone users to be able to enjoy our website properly. And we are already doing development on the computer, so that testing will be done.
